title: Use Somebody
why_this_song: Use Somebody by Kings of Leon (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "You know that I could use somebody"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Someone like you, and all you know, and how you speak"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I'm ready now, I'm ready now, I'm ready now"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You know that I could use somebody"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I've been roaming around"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "somebody" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "someone" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: You know that I could use somebody

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Use Somebody" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Use Somebody" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Use Somebody" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Use Somebody" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Use Somebody" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Use Somebody"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
